rules.rule_text:
rule angler_flash_uncompressed
{
	meta:
		author = "Josh Berry"
		date = "2016-06-26"
		description = "Angler Exploit Kit Detection"
		hash0 = "2543855d992b2f9a576f974c2630d851"
		sample_filetype = "unknown"
		yaragenerator = "https://github.com/Xen0ph0n/YaraGenerator"

	strings:
		$string0 = "DisplayObjectContainer"
		$string1 = "Xtime2"
		$string2 = "(HMRTQ"
		$string3 = "flash.events:EventDispatcher$flash.display:DisplayObjectContainer"
		$string4 = "_e_-___-__"
		$string5 = "ZviJbf"
		$string6 = "random-"
		$string7 = "_e_-_-_-_"
		$string8 = "_e_------"
		$string9 = "817677162"
		$string10 = "_e_-__-"
		$string11 = "-[vNnZZ"
		$string12 = "5:unpad: Invalid padding value. expected ["
		$string13 = "writeByte/"
		$string14 = "enumerateFonts"
		$string15 = "_e_---___"
		$string16 = "_e_-_-"
		$string17 = "f(fOJ4"

	condition:
		17 of them
}
